name: Jayaraman R
text: My Infosys journey starts with mentor with golden voice RANJITH. Don't have rules but have process. Providing support and pass on knowledge and experience with constructive feedback which helps to find our own answer. Thanks and all the best for the future endeavor

name: Prashanth Nair
text: All the best for your next chapter, Ranjith! It's been great working with you. I really enjoyed the chats we used to have about projects and work. I'll also remember the lunch we had together and the party we had on your last day in Auckland. Wishing you lots of success and happiness ahead

name: Srivalli Chikkala
text: Hi K.Ranjith All the best.It has been great working with you.Thank you for all your support and collaboration throughout the project. Hope we get the chance to work together again!

name: Alphonse Jose
text: Hi Ranjith, Wishing you all the very best as you move from DX to your new role in Engineering! It's been great working with you, and your dedication and positive energy have always made a difference in the team and especially on AI space and CoPilot. Thank you for all your contributions-DX will definitely miss you. All the best, keep in touch and keep shining! 🙂

name: Deepthi Duvvuru
text: Ranjith - Your technical expertise, professionalism, and dedication have been invaluable to the team. Thank you for your guidance, support, and the many contributions you've made during your time with us. It has been a pleasure working with you, and your presence will be greatly missed. Wishing you success in all your future endeavors

name: Velduti Vijay Sriram
text: Hi ranjith,Working under your leadership has been a truly memorable experience for me. Your guidance, patience, and constant support have helped me learn and grow both professionally and personally The lessons and values you shared with us will stay with me throughout my career.Thank you for everything you have done for the team and for always standing by us. Wishing you great success and happiness in your journey

name: Gopi Tejaswini
text: Hi Ranjith,Working with you for the past year has been a wonderful experience. I truly appreciate how calm, supportive, and positive you always were I have never seen anger in your words or actions and that made the team feel very comfortable. Thank you for the all the guidance and support. Wishing you continued success always.
